title: 没有面包 谈什么爱情 Remix Blueprint
creativeIntent: Rebuild the source as a punchier short with a stronger first three seconds and clearer emotional payoff.
targetAudience: short-video viewers who reward immediate visual hooks

segments.goal: Deliver the hook before any explanation.
segments.scenePlan: Start with the strongest outcome frame, then snap back to the setup environment.
segments.blockingPlan: Hold the subject nearly still first, then trigger a sudden directional move.
segments.cameraPlan: Fast close detail followed by a sharper medium reveal.
segments.narration: Start where the viewer would expect the ending, then immediately ask how we got there.
segments.visualPrompt: cinematic short video, nostalgic daily slice, tactile close-up, premium lighting, vertical 9:16

segments.goal: Build the world and make the action legible.
segments.scenePlan: Expand into the full environment while preserving the original momentum.
segments.blockingPlan: Subject advances deeper into frame; background elements answer the motion.
segments.cameraPlan: Medium handheld into lateral movement for energy.
segments.narration: Clarify what is happening without slowing the cut pace.
segments.visualPrompt: dynamic vertical ad shot, environmental storytelling, crisp motion, warm editorial grade
segments.notes: Use one clean gesture to define the story logic.

segments.goal: Close on a memorable repeatable image.
segments.scenePlan: Return to the payoff with more control and a cleaner background.
segments.blockingPlan: Subject holds eye-line for half a beat before the final gesture.
segments.cameraPlan: Locked hero frame with a subtle settle.
segments.narration: Land on the emotional or aesthetic reward with no extra explanation.
segments.visualPrompt: hero vertical closing shot, elegant framing, precise gesture, satisfying ending frame
segments.notes: This segment should be reusable as the opening payoff in future variants.
